problem: RH mag timing is off

problem: BOTH MAG SWITCH UPPER LIGHTS INOP

problem: During mag check on RH side RPM drop of 160 with significant detonation and an increase in EGT. Ran faulty mag checklist and noted similar drop in RPM with a greater increase of EGT and engine vibration.
action: Performed ground run of aircraft and verified discrep. Removed CYL # 4 lower spark plug and found it to be lead fouled. Cleaned gapped and bench tested CYL #4 lower spark plug. Installed CYL #4 lower spark plug. Performed ground run of aircraft, ops check good on mag drops and on EGT rise. ENG ran smooth the entire ground run.
